N
Co,Flex7,GL,GLDesc,BusCatDesc,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4,Flex5,Ledger,Flex8,Flex9
Co,Co Name,GL,GL Desc,Qualifier,Amount,YTD Amt,Map1,Map2,Reason,Reason Desc,Ledger,Lvl1,Lvl2
Co, GL, BusCatDesc
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2898000'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Txt,Flex3,PC,Flex4,CC,Zone,Flex5) (select '[batchID]-data2',JE,Short,Txt,Descr,Co,DocNbr,Yr,Ledger,Ref  from GAAP2Stat_Descr)
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Gross' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('13','16','18','20','21') or BusCat in ('10','20','21','22','23','24'))
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Ceded' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('14','15','22','23','24') or BusCat in ('30','31','32','33','34'))
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Claims' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('C','H')
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Underwriting' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('U','S','A')
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Investments' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('I')
update TransX set BusCatDesc = 'Executive' from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('E')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Co, Ledger,BusCatDesc, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, GL, Co, Ledger,BusCatDesc, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,'pass0' as Flex8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL, Co, Ledger,BusCatDesc)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex8 = 'pass0'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL
update TransX set Flex4 = '9999-001' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US'
update TransX set Flex4 = '0000-UG' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,'9999-001' as Flex4, -Amt1 as Amt1, -Amt2 as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4,Flex5, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select '[batchID]',(case when Yr < [Yr] and GL >= '4000000' then '3610000' else (case when Yr < [Yr] and GL = '3810001' then '3810000' else GL end) end) as GL, '' as BusCatDesc,Co,Ledger,JE,Ref,Amt as Amt1, (case when Yr = [Yr] then Amt else 0 end) as Amt2,'pass4' from GAAP2Stat where Yr <= [Yr] and (CarryFwd = 'Y' or Yr = '[Yr]') and (Period <= [Mo] or Yr < [Yr]) and JE like '%-H%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,'9999-001',round(-Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'pass4')
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-022' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2310','2400','2450') and GL in ('1310002','6913001','6913003') and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-023' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2310','2400','2450') and GL in ('1480002','6913000','6913002') and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-024' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2310','2400','2450') and GL in ('9920001','9920002','6915000') and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-045' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '%F' and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Co = '2450' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '245F'
update TransX set Co = '2999' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '299F'
update TransX set Co = '2008' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '200F'
update t set Flex4 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and m.Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and m.ID = 'GL2JE'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '2850500', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass5' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0010-043' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '2820000', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass5' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0010-015' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,'9999-001',round(- Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'pass5')
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-046' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '230C' and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Co = '2300' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '230C'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select '[batchID]',(case when Yr < [Yr] and GL >= '4000000' then '3610000' else (case when Yr < [Yr] and GL = '3810001' then '3810000' else GL end) end) as GL, '' as BusCatDesc,Co,Ledger,JE,Amt, (case when Yr = [Yr] then Amt else 0 end) as Amt2,'pass6' from GAAP2Stat where Yr <= [Yr] and (CarryFwd = 'Y' or Yr = '[Yr]') and (Period <= [Mo] or Yr < [Yr]) and not JE like '%-H%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,'9999-001',round(- Amt1,2),round(- Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'pass6')
update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-046' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('230C') and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Co = '2300' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '230C'

update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-047' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 in ('0010-046','9999-001') and ((Co = '2300' and GL in ('1940001','2855700')) or (GL like '5031%' and Co in ('2008','2300')))

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '1999901', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass7' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0010-047' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '1999901', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass7' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0010-050' and Co = '2008' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '2899901', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass7' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0010-050' and Co <> '2008' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger, '9999-001',round(-Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 = 'pass7')

Update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-031' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and cast(Co as varchar(10)) + cast(GL as varchar(10)) in (select CoGL from (select cast(Co as varchar(10)) + cast(GL as varchar(10)) as CoGL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' group by Co,GL) x where abs(x.amt1)<1)

Update TransX set Flex4 = '0020-061' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and cast(Co as varchar(10)) + substring(GL,1,5) in (select CoGL from (select cast(Co as varchar(10)) + substring(GL,1,5) as CoGL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from (select Co,GL,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and GL in (select Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2STAT' and ID = 'GL2JE5')) y group by Co,substring(GL,1,5)) x where abs(x.amt1)<1) and substring(GL,1,5) in (select distinct substring(Descr,1,5) from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2STAT' and ID = 'GL2JE5')

Update TransX set Flex4 = '0010-048' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and GL in (select Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2STAT' and ID = 'GL2JE89') and cast(Co as varchar(10)) + substring(GL,1,3) + substring(GL,6,2) in (select CoGL from (select CoGL,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from (select cast(Co as varchar(10)) + substring(GL,1,3) + substring(GL,6,2) as CoGL,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and GL in (select Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2STAT' and ID = 'GL2JE89')) z group by CoGL) x where abs(x.amt1)<1)

Update t set Flex4 = '0010-049' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.Descr where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex4 = '9999-001' and m.Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and m.ID = 'GL2JE6111' and  cast(t.Co as varchar(10)) + m.Field2 in (select CoField2 from (select cast(a.Co as varchar(10)) + b.Field2 as CoField2,sum(Amt1) as Amt1 from TransX a inner join Misc_Tables b on a.GL = b.Descr where a.KeyID = '[batchID]' and a.Flex4 = '9999-001' and b.Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and b.ID = 'GL2JE6111' group by a.Co,b.Field2) x where abs(x.amt1)<1)
Update TransX set Flex4 = '0020-050' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' and GL in ('1999901','2899901')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '3610000', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass8' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex4 like '0010-%'  or Flex4 like '0020-%'  or Flex4 like '0030-%') group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,'9999-001',round(- Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex4 like '0010-%'  or Flex4 like '0020-%'  or Flex4 like '0030-%') and GL = '3610000' and Flex8 = 'pass8')

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, BusCatDesc, Co, Ledger,Flex4, Amt1,Amt2,Flex8) (select KeyID, '3610000', '', Co, Ledger,Flex4,round(-sum(Amt1),2),round(-sum(Amt2),2),'pass9' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001' group by KeyID,Co,Ledger,Flex4)

update TransX set RefKey3= MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL and MapKey like 'M1%' and MapKey in (select ID from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and Field2 = 'GAAP' and Field3 = 'MapKeys') where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG'

update TransX set RefKey3 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL and MapKey like 'M4%' and MapKey in (select ID from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and Field2 = 'Stat' and Field3 = 'MapKeys') where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Ledger = 'US'
update TransX set RefKey1 = Field1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on RefKey3 = ID and Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and Field3 = 'MapKeys' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-02' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-01' and BusCatDesc = 'Ceded'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-04' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-03' and BusCatDesc = 'Ceded'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-10' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-09' and BusCatDesc = 'Ceded'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-13' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-12' and BusCatDesc = 'Ceded'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-11' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-15' and BusCatDesc = 'Claims'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-06' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-15' and BusCatDesc = 'Investments'
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-17' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 = 'M7-3-06-15' and BusCatDesc = 'Executive'
update TransX set Flex1 = Name from TransX inner join MapKeys on RefKey1 = MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on RefKey3 = ID and Table_ID = 'GAAP2Stat' and Field3 = 'MapKeys' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = substring(RefKey1,4,99) + '0 ' + Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey1 like '%-0'
update TransX set Flex1 = substring(RefKey1,4,99) + ' ' + Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not RefKey1 like '%-0'
update TransX set Flex2 = '(' + RefKey3 + ')  ' + Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL, BusCatDesc,GLDesc,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4,Ledger,Flex3) (select KeyID, Co,GL, BusCatDesc,GLDesc,round(sum(Amt1),2),round(sum(Amt2),2),Flex1,Flex2,Flex4,Ledger,'pass1' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co,GL, BusCatDesc,GLDesc,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4,Ledger)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex3 is null
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update x set Flex5 = y.Short From TransX x inner join GAAP2Stat_Descr y on x.Flex4 = y.JE where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex8 = '1' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '0000-UG'
update TransX set Flex8 = '3' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '9999-001'
update TransX set Flex8 = '2' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL
update TransX set Flex9 = substring(Flex4,1,4) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set Flex7 = c.SAPname from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Ledger = (case when Flex4 = '0000-UG' then 'UG' else 'US' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = '2999 Co RE PCs' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2945'
